identity.name: Vana Weaves
identity.aesthetic: Modern Heritage - Blending traditional Indian craftsmanship with clean, minimalist digital design.
identity.target_audience: Local Indian customers (Buying) & Non-technical Shop Owner (Managing)

grid_systems.bento_hero: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 h-auto md:h-[600px]

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 text-white hover:bg-orange-700 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-orange-600/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-stone-900 border border-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-50 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-stone-600 hover:text-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.product: group relative bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-stone-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.admin_stat: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between h-full

inputs.default: bg-white border-stone-200 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-orange-500/20 rounded-lg h-12 px-4

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-stone-100
navigation.admin_sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 p-6 hidden md:block

admin_dashboard.philosophy: Simplicity First. Avoid technical jargon. Use 'My Stock' instead of 'Inventory', 'Shop Performance' instead of 'Analytics'.

status_indicators.good: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium
status_indicators.warning: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium
status_indicators.critical: bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium

actions.primary: w-full bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white h-12 text-lg font-medium rounded-lg shadow-sm

hero.alt: Elegant woman in pink and black saree

textures.alt: White and black knit textile texture

people.alt: Happy Indian shopkeeper with white beard

general: Do not use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use realistic Indian names (e.g., 'Kanjeevaram Silk', 'Banarasi Georgette') and prices (e.g., '₹4,500').
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states.
All buttons must have a 'data-testid' attribute.
Do not use gradients for text or backgrounds unless specified in the 'colors' section.
Maintain a 'Light Mode' aesthetic for the customer-facing site to showcase product colors accurately.
accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards.
All images must have descriptive alt text.
Focus states must be clearly visible.
